pi_items.source: Direct query on official Chinook SQLite database from https://github.com/lerocha/chinook-database: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT CustomerId) FROM Customer
Direct query on official Chinook SQLite database: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Invoice

pi_items.metadata_value: ~$3.96 (from README.md line 54, claiming 'Minimum total spend: ~$3.96 (customers with 1-2 invoices)')
pi_items.source: Direct query on official Chinook SQLite database: SELECT MIN(SUM(Total)) FROM (SELECT SUM(Total) FROM Invoice GROUP BY CustomerId). Customer 59 (Puja Srivastava) spent $36.64 across 6 invoices.
Direct query on official Chinook SQLite database: SELECT MAX(SUM(Total)) FROM (SELECT SUM(Total) FROM Invoice GROUP BY CustomerId). Customer 6 (Helena Holý) spent exactly $49.62 across 7 invoices.
Direct query on official Chinook SQLite database calculating median customer total spending. The actual median is $37.62, which is slightly lower than the claimed $39-40 range.

pi_items.metadata_value: from README.md line 18: 'customer spend (which ranges from ~$0 to ~$50 total)'
pi_items.source: Direct query on official Chinook SQLite database showing actual range is $36.64 (min) to $49.62 (max), not ~$0 to ~$50 as claimed.

pi_items.metadata_value: from README.md line 8: 'The Chinook database has 59 real customers with full invoice histories'
pi_items.verified_value: Synthetic data - 'Sales information is auto generated using random data for a four year period'
pi_items.source: Official Chinook database repository at https://github.com/lerocha/chinook-database states that the Chinook database contains auto-generated synthetic data, not real customer data.
Direct query on official Chinook SQLite database: SELECT MIN(Total) FROM Invoice. Individual invoice amounts range from $0.99 to $25.86.

pi_items.metadata_value: Readme implies 1-2 invoices per customer at minimum
pi_items.verified_value: 6-7 invoices per customer (all customers have at least 6 invoices)
pi_items.source: Direct query on official Chinook SQLite database: SELECT MIN(count), MAX(count) FROM (SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM Invoice GROUP BY CustomerId) shows all customers have between 6 and 7 invoices.

privileged_info_summary: The Chinook database is a well-known public sample database containing 59 customers and 412 invoices. Contrary to task documentation claims, the data is entirely synthetic (auto-generated random data for a four-year period), not 'real customer' data. The actual customer spending ranges from $36.64 to $49.62 total (not ~$0 to ~$50 as claimed). The minimum spending claim of ~$3.96 is significantly contradicted by actual data showing $36.64 minimum. The maximum of $49.62 is accurate. Median customer spending is approximately $37.62-$39.40, close to the claimed ~$39-40. All customers have 6-7 invoices each, contradicting the README's suggestion that some customers might have only 1-2 invoices.
